data.content: Branch: foolery-97fb-terminate-kill. Commit: ee4fe2e6. Added POST /api/terminal/:id/terminate and POST /api/terminal/:id/kill backed by terminal-manager-signal helpers plus unit coverage for SIGTERM, SIGKILL, not_found, and already_exited. Validation: bun run lint passed, bunx tsc --noEmit passed, targeted vitest for terminal-manager-signal passed. Full bun run test still hits unrelated sandbox-sensitive failures in foolery-config CLI and install-launcher-path tests.
